Title: Firefly III user API endpoints expose all users' information to any authenticated user (IDOR)
Description: The User management API endpoints (`GET /api/v1/users` and `GET /api/v1/users/{id}`) are accessible to any authenticated user without admin/owner role verification, exposing all users' email addresses, roles, and account status.
NotImpacted: All versions before 6.4.23, all versions starting from 6.5.1
